name: The White House
subject: The White House Easter Egg Roll is a timeless tradition
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3513fbbffcb0b40570cd4c697ffac312cc22115ac695bc662483ed6c387f1842086f6feeecda98bd11bec4e0b3adc7965a8b5a43f7249d44

The White House Easter Egg Roll is a timeless tradition

Today, First Lady Melania Trump is hosting the 140th annual Easter Egg Roll on the White House’s South Lawn. The White House Easter Egg Roll is a timeless tradition that dates back to 1878 and the Presidency of Rutherford B. Hayes.

For the lucky winners of a public lottery held in February, this year’s festivities kicked off with a bright-and-early start at 7:30 a.m. They will continue well into this evening.

“On Easter Sunday, we proclaim with joy: ‘Christ is Risen,’” President Trump said in a video message to commemorate the Easter and Passover holidays. “We praise our Heavenly Father for the blessings of freedom and the gift of eternal life.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a2eb57317834ff87a3c16b60d2a3a34e20a745883c7692979e38751b97bc15fdf57d3d432d01670bce4eac2faf628d5e7388537716e96fa
See historic photos and more from the timeless tradition of the White House Easter Egg Roll.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a2eb57317834ff8a86d236f3124f45966197a4b24c5ca14f2f0ab3858b67d089cce4b76bc1bc3410368f931047cf99489233b8842f8053f
The First Lady visits a Florida children’s hospital ahead of the Easter holiday

Fighting reckless sanctuary policies

This week, President Trump used his weekly address to discuss the threat from lawless sanctuary jurisdictions in the United States—and to call upon Congress to act.

“In recent days, San Francisco officials denied ICE’s request to turn over a criminal alien with a prior conviction for battery and a charge for driving under the influence,” the President said. “In another city in California, local law enforcement recently denied ICE’s request to turn over a criminal alien convicted of Sexual Battery who had a history of domestic violence.”

The U.S. Constitution applies equally to every State in our Union. For any jurisdiction simply to disregard the rule of law is a brazen attack on our very system of government.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a2eb57317834ff865fd9f26292924fbb85e9107a8ff44983fd161e9ec5053f82bd11674b60a493a697940ccc37458c5494671a6673bfc6b
Watch President Trump’s weekly address on saving American lives and American cities.

Infrastructure: What they’re saying

When President Trump traveled to Richfield, Ohio, last week to talk about his plan to rebuild American infrastructure, leaders from both government and industry paid close attention:

- “With more Americans working and the future finally looking up, Congress will continue to work with @POTUS to lay the foundation for decades of continued prosperity.” – House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy
- “The President is right. We must work together to update our failing roads & bridges.” – Sen. Dean Heller (R-NV)
- “We need to reform the processes that are holding projects back.” – Rep. Doug Lamborn (R-CO)
- “Like tax reform, a significant investment in our nation’s infrastructure has the power to supercharge manufacturing in America.” – National Association of Manufacturers President Jay Timmons

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6a2eb57317834ff80e05fd9518faa43acb6f7c0e2c069384990de0d110e3b2895fe135895c106f8d6b309a90a9c3bed0c1d947bade4826fb
Read more of the reactions to President Trump’s plan to rebuild America’s crumbling infrastructure.

Photo of the Day

The traditional decorated wooden Easter Eggs commemorating the 140th White House Easter Egg Roll | April 2, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Stephanie Chasez)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump and the First Lady hosted the White House Easter Egg Roll Breakfast Reception before hosting the White House Easter Egg Roll.

This afternoon, the President will meet with new National Economic Council Director Larry Kudlow.

subject: tell Congress to STOP gun violence (sign this letter)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Thousands of people from Pennsylvania and across the country are taking a stand against gun violence. They know we need commonsense action in response to the terrifying reality of gun violence and mass shootings.

And Governor Tom Wolf agrees.

Stand with Governor Wolf by co-signing this letter to Congress demanding commonsense gun reform.

**[Click here to co-sign our letter demanding commonsense gun reform ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7f/73a2bc12/3f63279a/1fcd1606/483928259/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/cosign-gun-letter?utm_campaign=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+cosign+our+letter+demandin")** | _[March 28, 2018](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7f/73a2bc12/3f63279a/1fcd1605/483928259/VEsE/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/cosign-gun-letter?utm_campaign=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_content=2+-+March+28+2018")_ To: U.S. Congress
From: Your Name Here (Signature Pending)

**[It's time to take action to prevent gun violence in our communities.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7f/73a2bc12/3f63279a/1fcd1604/483928259/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/cosign-gun-letter?utm_campaign=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_content=3+-+Itrsquos+time+to+take+action+to+prevent+")**

It's time we recognize the terrifying reality of gun violence in our nation and take action.

I'm urging you to take action to ban military style weapons that have been used to commit these heinous crimes. I'm urging you to prevent individuals with a history of mental illness or criminal convictions from buying firearms.

Doing nothing is no longer an acceptable solution.

It is not the time to say "we've done all we can" and wait for the next tragedy to happen. Now is the time to ban military-style weapons like AR-15s and dangerous accessories like bump stocks. Had Congress not allowed a ban on these weapons to expire in 2004, the deaths that have occurred in Orlando, Las Vegas, Sandy Hook or Parkland may have never happened.

These tragedies are becoming far too common. You must act to prevent another town being added to this list.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

_Your Name Here_ [** SIGNATURE PENDING **](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecc7f/73a2bc12/3f63279a/1fcd160b/483928259/VEsC/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/cosign-gun-letter?utm_campaign=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180402_gun_clk_clq_act_let_&utm_content=4+-++SIGNATURE+PENDING+")

| | | Friend,

It's no secret that who I am was forged in New Mexico's incredible outdoor landscapes. There is no one I would trust more to protect those landscapes than Garrett VeneKlasen.

Garrett has been on the front lines of standing up to President Trump's border wall and evisceration of our environmental laws and regulations. And we've fought side-by-side to make sure that we protect our public lands from privatization and misuse. **He won 't have to learn on the job - he's ready to lead on day one.

Which is why I'm thrilled to join him tonight at Bow and Arrow Brewing to support his campaign to be our next Land Commissioner before his crucial deadline** \- [**Will you join us? subject: They underestimated you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3133/9e00690/45faf487/24024cb5/3567818054/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180402_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180402_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friend --

There have been many who have doubted us since we launched this campaign. They told us we couldn't do it because I didn't have a famous last name, or the ability to write myself a six-figure check.

But they underestimated you, and the power of people coming together to support a progressive movement.

Over 4,000 people just like you came together to fuel our campaign and help us hit our first end-of-quarter goal of 2018 -- and I just want you to know how incredibly grateful and humbled I am for your support. Thank you.

Thank you for believing in the possibility of building a better Florida, for investing in a brighter future for all of us no matter where we may fall on the economic ladder, and for being a dedicated member of Team Gillum.

Together, we're going to keep on moving forward to victory in August and then November.

Let's bring it home,

Andrew

name: =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=9C=AF_Special_Note_from_Team_Kaine_=E2=9C=AF?=
subject: Thank you so much!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

We've officially made it through the first major filing deadline of 2018, and wanted to send over a note to thank you so much for your support! Now that we're just seven months away from the election, we need you on our side more than ever. [Add your name if you're ready to keep fighting with Tim all the way through November 6th.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=W7j8%2BaNIMQ4EJPjoVKlxMi1l9RTAj2Am)

Our team is so grateful for people like you - the people who dig deep and support our campaign, making it possible for Tim to travel around the Commonwealth talking to voters in every corner of Virginia. Because as he likes to say, **" It's not about the money. It's about the many."**

You've made it possible for that "many" to grow and grow. It's never just been about the dollars we raise, it's about the people we bring together. Your support - financial and otherwise - is truly invaluable as we build our movement against the divisiveness that the Republicans in this race have embraced and as we continue to bring commonsense ideas to improve people's lives to Washington. [Add your name right now if you're still in to keep building that movement together.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hqlDMcBZSTPh0xEtK0yRFC1l9RTAj2Am)

This campaign belongs to all of us. We've come out of this first quarter in great shape, showing the strength in our values, in our supporters, and in Democrats in Virginia. [Say you're in to finish what we started.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Kv95Ct6pLdW7tZrn6aP%2BTi1l9RTAj2Am)

Thank you so, so much!

_Team Kaine_

P.S. Can you forward this email to any friends, neighbors, or family members in the Commonwealth who'd like to be part of what we're building? We'll need the numbers on our side if we're going to win big in November! [If they add their name here they can stay up to date with the campaign as well >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VCis9WNB2PwGZAYv9UOEBy1l9RTAj2Am)
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MLiP7v%2F%2FGMvA9wo2YIOOwC4F3KiziFcG)
---

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Add your name for a clean Dream Act
body:
Each day DACA recipients across the nation lose their legally protected status
#
Friends,
Each day DACA recipients across the nation lose their legally protected status. **This will continue to happen even while court rulings put a stay on Trump's decision to end DACA entirely.** Some DREAMers will fall back into the shadows, lose their jobs, or pause their educations. Others will be detained and deported by Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
The silence of Congress speaks volumes. Standing by while thousands of people face the risk of being separated from their families, the homes they grew up in, and their communities is not an option. **Tell Congress to once and for all put people before profit.**
[**Add your name to join a movement of conscience to keep pushing for a clean DREAM Act.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac1e/bed43eb/5865883e/75fe6b15/41449200/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/the-fight-for-a-clean-dream-act-continues?source=em180402-full")
Legislation to protect DREAMers once and for all has been introduced every year since 2001. DREAMers and allies have been working toward immigration justice for decades, and your support can lift up the progress they're making.
[**Add your name to join the fight for a clean DREAM Act.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac1e/bed43eb/5865883e/75fe6b15/41449200/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/the-fight-for-a-clean-dream-act-continues?source=em180402-full")
We will need all of the help we can get to apply the pressure on lawmakers to get this done. If they don't, we have a grassroots organizing force ready to bring people to Washington this November who will.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

This will continue to happen even while court rulings put a stay on Trump's decision to end DACA entirely. Some DREAMers will fall back into the shadows, lose their jobs, or pause their educations. Others will be detained and deported by Immigration and Customs Enforcement. The silence of Congress speaks volumes. Standing by while thousands of people face the risk of being separated from their families, the homes they grew up in, and their communities is not an option. Tell Congress to once and for all put people before profit. "" Legislation to protect DREAMers once and for all has been introduced every year since 2001.
